name: Mouse ESC Medium
nameCn: 小鼠 ES 细胞培养基

notes.en: LIF maintains pluripotency — add fresh. For feeder-free: gelatin + 2i (PD0325901 + CHIR99021) + LIF. Compact domed colonies = pluripotent.
notes.zh: LIF 维持多能性——需新鲜加入。无饲养层培养：明胶 + 2i (PD0325901 + CHIR99021) + LIF。致密圆顶样克隆 = 多能。

usage.en: Embryonic stem cell (ESC) serum-containing LIF culture medium for pluripotency maintenance.
usage.zh: 含 LIF 的胚胎干细胞培养基，用于维持多能性。

prepSteps.step: To 500 mL Knockout DMEM (or DMEM/F12), add 75 mL Knockout Serum Replacement (15%).
Add 5 mL L-glutamine (2 mM) and 0.5 mL β-mercaptoethanol (0.1 mM).
Add LIF (1000 U/mL) for mouse ESCs or bFGF (10 ng/mL) for human ESCs.
Store at 4°C for up to 2 weeks; add LIF/bFGF fresh.
